name: North & Central Vietnam Easy Adventure for Family with Kids 10 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Mai Chau - Halong Bay - Hoi An - Cam Thanh Village
highlights: Have an exciting Jeep tour to discover the tranquil countryside and the bustling city of Hanoi
Chilling time with your family in the peaceful Duong Lam village and Mai Chau
Cruising the magnificent landscape of Halong Bay
Take part in fun family-bonding activities in the charming Hoi An

itinerary.title: Welcome to Hanoi - Begin Your Cultural Escape
itinerary.description:
Arrive and get picked up at Noi Bai International Airport. Your family will transfer to the hotel in Hanoi to check in. Have a rest after a long flight, then feel free to explore the beautiful Hanoi Old Quarter later. NOTE:

Please present at Pole No.10 (Outside the Terminal Gate) for our representative to search for you. Contact your travel consultant if you can’t find the guide

itinerary.title: Hanoi City Adventure on a Jeep
itinerary.description:
Morning

After breakfast, at 8:00, your family will start an intriguing trip on a Jeep drive past Hanoi’s top attractions and the breezy Red River:

First, you will discover the peaceful Red River countryside for 1.5 hours. Within 20 minutes, leave behind the bustling city as we drive toward the serene Red River bank: 

Take a short walk over a bridge that is unknown to the locals. Reach the rugged island for a 4WD adventure along the small off-roads of the green oasis with stunning views of banana plantations, fruit, vegetable, and flower farms. Along the way, visit local villages and communi...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Duong Lam Ancient Village - Scenic Drive to Mai Chau
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 8:00, our driver and guide will pick you up at your hotel and take you to Duong Lam Ancient Village. Participate on a bicycle tour through the small, historic lanes to view the Mong Phu Temple while learning about Vietnamese farmers' daily life and agricultural techniques. Make a pit stop to visit two old houses and interact with the locals who currently live here. Enjoy lunch at a restaurant in the neighborhood and order some traditional dishes. Afternoon

Pay a visit to the temples dedicated to Ngo Quyen and Phung Hung, two of Vietnam's most revered historical figures

itinerary.title: Mai Chau Easy Biking/Trekking Trip - Back to Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning & Afternoon

Start your day at the majestic sunrise in Mai Chau. Breakfast is prepared and ready to be served. Your family can choose a cycling or trekking tour to explore the beautiful rural areas. Let's travel to more distant rural villages of Thai tribes, such as Na Meo, Na Mo, and Xam Pa, with a local Thai guide to understand the people's traditions and culture better. Discuss with the local people and learn about their customs and traditions

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Halong Bay Cruising Overnight
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have a tasty breakfast at the hotel, then get ready for a fantastic family trip cruising in the magnificent Halong Bay. 8:00 - 8:30: Being picked up and leaving for Halong Bay, one of the UNESCO World Heritage Sites for its spectacular seascape. 11:30 - 12:00: Embark on the cruise, meet the friendly crew with a fresh welcome drink, and listen to the safety instructions before the trip begins. Enjoy a delicious seafood lunch while the yacht sailing among beautiful limestone islands and caves. Afternoon

Take part in many family-friendly activities to explore the bay, such as visiting t...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Fly South to Da Nang - Hoi An Heritage Town
itinerary.description:
Morning

Waking up early to witness the miraculous sunrise over the bay. Then join a Tai Chi class to boost your energy. Have breakfast while the cruise passes a marvelous area with beautiful islands and islets. Depending on the cruise schedule, your family may explore more stunning caves in Halong Bay or go kayaking. 9:00 - 9:30: Back to the boat and complete the check-out procedure

itinerary.title: Tra Que Village Farming Tour and Lantern making Class
itinerary.description:
Morning

Have breakfast and prepare for a trip to the countryside of Hoi An. 08:00: Pick up at your hotel's lobby and start the tour with a guide to explore Tra Que Vegetable Village, famous for its clean products. On the way, visit Hoi An colorful central market. You can chat with the local sellers and learn about the ingredients for cooking lessons later. 09:00 - 9:30: Learn about the vegetable village's history and vegetable production

itinerary.title: Basket Boat trip in Cam Thanh Village - Hoi An Memory Show
itinerary.description:
Morning

8:00: Your driver will pick you up from your hotel in Hoi An and then transfer to Cam Thanh Village, a famous attraction in Hoi An. Get a basket boat, and begin a fun exploration tour among the water coconut with the locals:

Join a thrilling boat race between the baskets, or try out the exhilarating experience of the boat that twists and turns. Take time to become familiar with the traditional Vietnamese boat by learning how to row it. Participate in all of the exciting activities that are typical of fishermen here. Listen to the fascinating tales that took place during the Vietnam W...

itinerary.title: Free Day in Hoi An - Discover at Your Own Pace
itinerary.description:
Enjoy a delicious breakfast at your hotel. Have a day free to explore the charming town with your family or choose one of our optional tours to experience Hoi An further:

Authentic Hoi An - Cooking Class & Biking Full Day	FROM US $67 /pax
Hoi An: Half-Day Walking City Tour‎	FROM US $34 /pax
Cu Lao Cham Full Day Join Tour from Hoi An	FROM US $39 /pax
My Son Sanctuary Half-Day Tour from Hoi An	FROM US $48 /pax
Hoi An Motorbike Street Food Tour Half Day	FROM US $58 /pax

itinerary.title: Hoi An - Da Nang Departure
itinerary.description: After breakfast, check out your hotel, then transfer to the airport in Da Nang for a flight back to your country. End of service. We hope to see you again!

included: Hoi An Memories show ticket ECO class
Entrance fees, performances, boat trips & excursions
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
